[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110010 3
1 0110111 5
2 1100001 3
3 0101110 4
4 0111001 4
5 0011001 3
6 0001111 4
7 0110010 3

01 10 0101110 4 match 3
12 21 0111111 6
23 32 0111001 4 match 4
34 43 0011111 5
45 54 0111111 6
56 65 0110111 5 match 1
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1101101 5

02 20 0111101 5
13 31 0111111 6
24 42 0111111 6
35 53 0111011 5
46 64 0111111 6
57 75 1111111 a
60 06 0111111 6
71 17 1101111 6

25 52 0111011 5
36 63 0111111 6
47 74 1001111 5
50 05 0111110 5
61 16 0111111 6
72 27 1111101 6

15 51 0111110 5
26 62 0111111 6
37 73 1011101 5
